sutta: monks there are these 4 efforts what for the effort to restrain the effort to abandon the effort to generate and the effort to nurture and of what's sort monks is the effort to restrain hearing among seeing an object with the eye does not grasp at its general features or its details inasmuch as coveting and dejection evil and profitable states might flow in upon 1 who dwells with his eye faculty unrestrained he applies himself to such restraint sets a guard over the eye faculty wins the restraint thereof hearing a sound with the ear or smelling an odor with a nose or tasting a flavor with a tongue or with body contacting tangibles or with mind cognizing mental states he does not grasp at the general features or at the details in as much as coveting and dejection evil states might flow in upon 1 who dwells with his faculties unrestrained he applies himself to such restraint means restrained thereof this month is called the effort to restrain
